user.title: PriceWatch Setup
user.description: Configure your PriceWatch AI price monitor. You can add products to monitor via the dashboard card or via the `pricewatch.add_monitor` service after setup.

data.email_notify_service: HA notify service for alerts (e.g. notify.gmail)

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Anthropic API

add_monitor.name: Add Price Monitor
add_monitor.description: Add a product to monitor for price drops.

product.name: Product
product.description: Product name to search for (e.g. 'Sony WH-1000XM5 headphones')

email.name: Alert email
email.description: Email address to receive price drop alerts

threshold.name: Alert threshold (%)
threshold.description: Percentage price drop that triggers an alert (1-50)

remove_monitor.name: Remove Monitor
remove_monitor.description: Remove a product from price monitoring.

monitor_id.name: Monitor ID
monitor_id.description: ID of the monitor to remove (visible in sensor attributes)

scan_now.name: Scan Now
scan_now.description: Immediately re-scan all monitored products for price changes.
